data.body:
## Completion Verification Report

**Verdict: FAIL**

### AC 1 вЂ” ISF implemented per its descriptor (single-turn/2-STEP, fed session log + ticket graph, NOT agent); fires only when a session log is linked.

**NOT MET** (partial вЂ” the "ticket graph" feed is absent).

The single-turn, non-agentic ISF call exists and is correctly wired (`passes.pass1_isf`, `passes.py:292вЂ“336`, `execution_mode="single_turn"`, `_agentic: False`). The "fires only when a session log is linked" gate is implemented (`orchestrator.py:648вЂ“660`; `_linked_session_log` returns `(None, False)` when no session_log dep, producing `coverage["isf"] = {"ran": False, "reason": "no linked session_log"}`). The 2-STEP protocol lives in the finder prompt (`plan_review_isf_finder.md:15вЂ“17`).

However, AC #1 states ISF must be "FED the linked session log + the pre-resolved TICKET GRAPH." A search for `ticket_graph` across `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/` returns zero matches. `pass1_isf` is fed only `plan` + `session_log_text` (`passes.py:304вЂ“318`); `_resolve_system` renders only the `{{plan}}` variable (`passes.py:171вЂ“180`). No pre-resolved ticket-graph blob is constructed or passed to the model. Multiple reviewer comments (G6, repeated) flagged this exact gap by name and it was never resolved in code or AC text.

### AC 2 вЂ” Oversized-log fallback: documented SUMMARY + reduced confidence (never summarizes the plan).

**MET.** `summarize_for_isf()` exists (`passes.py:339вЂ“350`) and summarizes only the log text; the plan is never passed to it. `_reduced_confidence=summarized` is tagged on each finding (`passes.py:333`). A summary note is appended to evidence (`passes.py:323вЂ“324`). `coverage["isf"] = {"ran": True, "summarized": summarized}` is recorded (`orchestrator.py:650`). The summarizer prompt (`plan_review_isf_summarizer.md`) explicitly states "the plan is never summarized."

### AC 3 вЂ” Validated on labeled cases: catches a silently-descoped requirement (recall); no false-fire on honored/justified-descope plans.

**MET.** `eval_specs/plan-review-isf-finder.eval.yaml` ships recall cases ISF-R1 and ISF-R2 (expect: finding), false-fire cases ISF-F1 (honored intent) and ISF-F2 (justified-descope) (expect: pass), deterministic scorers `recall_on_silent_drop` and `no_fire_on_honored_or_justified_descope`, and a gold set covering all four cases. The spec is wired into the Inspect-AI eval seam.
